title: HttpRequest Object
description: Supports the ability to make HTTP requests.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Execute this request asynchronously. The response will be sent to the completed event.

methods.name: executeSync
methods.description: Execute this request synchronously. This will block the thread until the request completes.

methods.name: getHeader
methods.description: Gets the value of the specified header and returns the value.

methods.name: hasHeader
methods.description: Gets if the request has a header with the given name. This is useful to distinguish between the case where a header is not set and the case where a header is set to an empty string.

methods.name: removeHeader
methods.description: Removes a header from the request.

methods.name: setHeader
methods.description: Sets a header for the request.

properties.name: data
properties.description: Gets and sets the body data to send with this request.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: method
properties.description: Gets and sets the method to use for the request.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: url
properties.description: Gets and sets the URL to make the request to.

events.name: completed
events.description: The completed event fires when the request has completed. This event will fire on successful or failure.

related_samples.name: Gets all properties using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Fetches bulk component properties of the root component and from occurrences via single GraphQL query.

related_samples.description: Fetches part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

related_samples.name: Set part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Sets part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

classType.title: HttpRequest.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

syntax.python:
# Uses no optional arguments.
returnValue = adsk.core.HttpRequest.create(url)

# Uses optional arguments.
returnValue = adsk.core.HttpRequest.create(url, method)

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL to make the request to.

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: The method to use for the request. The default is GetMethod.   This is an optional argument whose default value is HttpMethods.GetMethod.

related_samples.name: Set part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Sets part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

execute.title: HttpRequest.execute Method
execute.description: Execute this request asynchronously. The response will be sent to the completed event.
execute.return_description: Returns true if the request was successfully started.

executeSync.title: HttpRequest.executeSync Method
executeSync.description: Execute this request synchronously. This will block the thread until the request completes.
executeSync.return_description: Returns the response from making this request, or null if an error prevents the request from starting.

related_samples.name: Gets all properties using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Fetches bulk component properties of the root component and from occurrences via single GraphQL query.

related_samples.name: Get part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Fetches part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

related_samples.name: Set part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Sets part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

getHeader.title: HttpRequest.getHeader Method
getHeader.description: Gets the value of the specified header and returns the value.
getHeader.return_description: Returns the value of the header, or empty if the header was not found. You can use the hasHeader method to determine if the header exists before getting it. This is especially useful in the case where the header exists but has an empty string value.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The case insensitive name of the header.

hasHeader.title: HttpRequest.hasHeader Method
hasHeader.description: Gets if the request has a header with the given name. This is useful to distinguish between the case where a header is not set and the case where a header is set to an empty string.
hasHeader.return_description: Returns true if a header with this name was set in the response.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The case insensitive name of the header.

headers.title: HttpRequest.headers Method
headers.return_description: Returns true on success or false on error.

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: An array of all the header key names.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of all the header values.

related_samples.name: Gets all properties using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Fetches bulk component properties of the root component and from occurrences via single GraphQL query.

related_samples.name: Get part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Fetches part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

related_samples.name: Set part number using GraphQL
related_samples.description: Sets part number of root component and from occurrences via GQL query.

removeHeader.title: HttpRequest.removeHeader Method
removeHeader.description: Removes a header from the request.
removeHeader.return_description: Returns true if the header was found and removed.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The case insensitive name of the header.

setHeader.title: HttpRequest.setHeader Method
setHeader.description: Sets a header for the request.
setHeader.return_description: Returns true if setting the header succeeds.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the header value.

completed.title: HttpRequest.completed Event
completed.description: The completed event fires when the request has completed. This event will fire on successful or failure.

data.description: Gets and sets the body data to send with this request.

# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = httpRequest_var.data

# Set the value of the property.
httpRequest_var.data = propertyValue
